Both modify weapprof.2da (weapon styles rows 28-32) and APR tables (clswpbon.2da/wspatck.2da). HT cn:5 revises style bonuses via STYLBONU.2DA; cdtweaks cn:2060 grants styles to non-fighters. HT cn:7 adds APR via CLAB ability tables; cdtweaks cn:2440 sets clswpbon globally + modifies wspatck.2da. HT cn:7 checks for cdtweaks cn:2240 but NOT cn:2440. HT cn:5/6/7 present, cdtweaks cn:2440 present, cdtweaks cn:2060/2160-2164 absent. APR overlap: HT cn:7 uses spell-based APR via CLABs, cdtweaks cn:2440 modifies base tables — they stack (may give too much APR). Consider removing one APR component.

NOT a real conflict. Tashia uses standard RealSetGlobalTimer mechanics that fire independently of dream cutscene content. Romance timers are checked in main NPC script loop after PartyRested(), not during dream sequences. Faster cutscenes keep RestParty() calls intact. Tashia's cuttas05.baf dream sequence calls RestParty() independently of romance timer logic. Same pattern as Solaufein and other standard romance mods — none set romance variables during dream cutscene execution.
advisories.source: Tashia tashia.baf lines 557-592: RealGlobalTimerExpired checked after PartyRested(); cuttas05.baf line 28: RestParty() independent of timers; cdtweaks faster_start.tpa preserves RestParty(), 2026-04
